name: Chicken Divan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place chicken breasts in a covered baking dish and cook for 40 minutes.
3. Remove chicken and cut into pieces.
4. In a lightly greased casserole dish, combine broccoli and chicken pieces.
5. Stir together soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, curry powder, and cheese until well mixed.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken and broccoli.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly on top of the casserole.
8. Spread melted butter or margarine over the bread crumbs.
9. Place the dish in a preheated oven set to 350°F and bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
10. Serve with egg noodles that have been buttered and garnished with chopped parsley.
Note: This recipe is from The Canadian Heritage Cookbook, ch.
